_comment: Copy to .claude/settings.json in your project root. reflect uses PostToolUse (observation), distinct from stetkeep's PreToolUse (prevention).
_platform_note: The hook command below uses bash. macOS/Linux/Git Bash users: keep as-is. Windows native PowerShell users: change 'command' to 'powershell -File $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/reflect-trigger.ps1'.

hooks._comment: bash version (macOS/Linux/Git Bash). For Windows native PowerShell, replace with: powershell -File $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/reflect-trigger.ps1

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Tier 3 (utterance) detection. UserPromptSubmit does not support matchers — fires on every prompt. Filtering happens inside the script. PowerShell users: replace with reflect-utterance.ps1.

hooks.command: echo 'reflect active. Triggers when revert signals cluster (≥3 in 10 tool calls). Manual: /brain-reflect.'

_notes.hook_choice: PostToolUse instead of PreToolUse — reflect observes patterns; it does not block actions. Stetkeep occupies the PreToolUse slot for prevention.
_notes.timeout: 30s allows the Opus 4.7 API call to complete with adaptive thinking. Hook returns silently if the trigger threshold is not met (most calls).
_notes.subagents: reflection-orchestrator is defined in .claude/agents/. Available via /brain-reflect for manual invocation.
_notes.rules: reflect-rules in .claude/rules/ auto-loads on src/**, lib/**, app/** file access. It declares .reflect/session-guidance.md as a context source.
